---
title: "The Team"
subtitle: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
toc: false
---

Three analysts on the trail of an embargo breach. We built the visual analytics tool that follows the signals back to the messages that prove them.

::: {.team-grid}

::: {.member-card}
<img class="avatar" src="images/mark_avatar.jpg" alt="Mark Yee">
<div class="member-name">Mark Yee</div>
<div class="member-role">_Role to be added_</div>
Contribution to be added.
:::

::: {.member-card}
<img class="avatar" src="images/serene_avatar.jpg" alt="Serene Cheng">
<div class="member-name">Serene Cheng</div>
<div class="member-role">_Role to be added_</div>
Contribution to be added.
:::

::: {.member-card}
<img class="avatar" src="images/carina_avatar.jpg" alt="Carina Faith Peh">
<div class="member-name">Carina Faith Peh</div>
<div class="member-role">_Role to be added_</div>
Contribution to be added.
:::

:::

## Contributions

| Member | Contribution |
|---|---|
| Mark Yee | _to be added_ |
| Serene Cheng | _to be added_ |
| Carina Faith Peh | _to be added_ |
